info.title: Assembly Version Incrementer
info.description: Increments Assembly Version (and/or FileInfo) in C# and .NET projects: both old .net style and new SDK/.NETCore style

options.name: --backup
options.description: Keep old version of file as backup [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Quiet operation - do not print messages [default: False]

options.name: --force
options.description: Add version information if not present in the file [default: False]

options.name: --set-version
options.description: Set specific version instead of incrementing (e.g. '1.2.3') []

options.name: --set-increment-by
options.description: Sets the value for the increment (i.e. by how much the version string should be incremented) [default: 1]

options.name: --set-increment-position
options.description: Zero-based index of position within the version string to increment, e.g. if version string is '1.2.3' and increment position is set to 1, this will increment number '2' from the version string)
